title: viola × fujisanensis
intro: Viola × fujisanensis is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Viola japonica and Viola ocellata, native to Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Viola × fujisanensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Viola × fujisanensis include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
